metadata.description: The Fused Agent Kernel as a Claude Code plugin: a default-deny tool-call firewall + result quarantine you put in front of your agent over MCP.

plugins.name: fak
plugins.description: Adjudicate every tool call like a syscall. fak's MCP server exposes capability-gated adjudication verbs (fak_adjudicate / fak_syscall / fak_admit) so Claude Code can screen a proposed tool call, run one through the kernel, or quarantine a result before it enters context.
